<!--
Thanks for opening a PR! Please make sure you've read CONTRIBUTING.md.

Keep the title in the same shape as our commits:
   feat(scope): short imperative subject
-->

## Summary

<!-- 1-3 sentences. Why does this PR exist? -->

## Type of change

<!-- Check all that apply. -->

- [ ] feat — new feature
- [ ] fix — bug fix
- [ ] refactor — internal change, no behaviour difference
- [ ] perf — performance improvement
- [ ] docs — documentation only
- [ ] test — adds or improves tests
- [ ] build / ci / chore — tooling or housekeeping
- [ ] **Breaking change** (requires a major-version bump)

## Related issues

<!-- "Closes #123", "Refs #456". Leave blank if none. -->

## Screenshots / output

<!--
If your change affects something visible (CLI output, README, dashboard…),
paste the before/after here. Use code blocks, not screenshots, for terminal
output.
-->

## Checklist

- [ ] I read [CONTRIBUTING.md](../blob/main/CONTRIBUTING.md).
- [ ] My branch is rebased on the latest `main`.
- [ ] `pre-commit run --all-files` is green locally.
- [ ] `pytest` is green locally.
- [ ] If I added a new runtime dependency, I justified it in the PR description.
- [ ] I updated `CHANGELOG.md` under the `[Unreleased]` section in the right Keep-a-Changelog category.
- [ ] I updated user-facing docs (`README.md`, `COMMANDS.md`) if my change is user-visible.
- [ ] If this is a breaking change, the PR description explains the migration path.

## Notes for reviewers

<!--
Anything that would help a reviewer: tricky commits to look at first,
intentional non-obvious decisions, follow-up work that will land in a
later PR, etc.
-->
